test_sufficiency_summary: Passing tactical tests are insufficient because they do not cover the live FBattleDisplay::onMoveDone() -> FBattleScreen::setPhase(PH_FINALIZE_MOVE) path, allowing the move-finalization regression to escape.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md matches the intended architecture, but doc/DesignNotes.md records validation success for behavior the shipped runtime move-finalization path does not currently satisfy.

findings.summary: Move completion bypasses FTacticalGame::completeMovePhase() on the live UI path.
Tests validate helper internals but miss the runtime PH_FINALIZE_MOVE caller path.
Validation notes claim shipped behavior that the current runtime path does not provide.
